pageContext.name: T-Rex D-Stage
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Beast Kingdom present the T-Rex D-Stage Statue.  The D-Stage, staging your dream collection from Beast Kingdom is ready to roar its way onto a desk near you with the release of the Jurassic World collection of dioramas!  One of the scariest and most ferocious creatures that has ever walked this planet, the T-Rex, is seen here paired with a classic ancient scene, including an erupting volcano and lush forests!  Can you spot an important link to the movies at his feet? Take home a little bit of the movie magic, in full three dimensional form with the D-Stage collection!
